thought_beat_text: The seams won't close. He sees the fingerprint in the clay, the foam-core edge catching light, and knows that saying nothing is itself a kind of performance—which means the only honest move left is to admit the whole thing is rigged, including his silence about it.
residue_summary: The artifice is now undeniable, and so is the choice: speak the construction or become complicit in the lie of seamlessness.
image_hint: spotlight cutting across a stage edge, revealing the join between two pieces of the world
audio_hint: ticking underneath a held breath, both accelerating toward the same point
